text.title: Burndown Diagnosis Cheatsheet Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Burndown Diagnosis Cheatsheet end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: verify-drift
step.action: Confirm actual line ≥20% above ideal at mid-sprint.
step.decision-gate: If <20%, defer diagnostic — sprint is on-track noise.

step.name: scan-four-causes
step.input: Sprint scope + blockers + PTO log + estimate history

step.name: collect-evidence
step.action: Per suspected cause, attach ≥1 evidence row.

step.name: write-remediations
step.action: ≥1 remediation per cause; owner + due date.

step.name: update-sprint
step.action: Execute owner-side changes (scope cut, blocker escalation, etc.) immediately.

step.name: archive
step.action: Save to /diagnostics/sprint-{id}/; quarterly pattern review reads from this dir.
